div.div:
Information consists only of a String
The String is "divided" by the ~ Symbol in parts.
Depending on how many parts of the String has,
it means a different action for
the receiving Clients.

div.div:
Socket Server
Receives the String from one Client via a listener on another thread.
Sends the Message to all other Clients.

div.div:
The first message from Server to Client is
done by the Server itself with another Client
sending any String.
This message consists only of a Number which
is the order of the players and is only sent once and as
soon as the server is running.

switch.text: The first message from Server to Client is...

div.div:
Upon receiving the sent String,
it is converted into its Parts by the
Client itself.
The Client then chooses the right action
depending on how many Parts.
